metadata._llmHint: This is a manifest file. Each epic's full content is in a separate file. Epic files: epics/epic-{id}/epic.json (relative to this file) Stories: epics/epic-{id}/stories/{id}.json  (e.g. S-1.2.json — immutable ID, no slugs) Tests: epics/epic-{id}/tests/test-cases.json, test-design.json To read a specific epic, load its file from the epics array below.

epics.title: Replicate QAWeb orgs to SalesForce + link orgs to displays.
